items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for parallel signature routing.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the parallel signature routing (Party A and B simultaneously, then C). However, the evidence provided does not include any API endpoints or mechanisms that enforce this routing behavior. The linked use case describes a sequential workflow without confirming the existence of parallel routing, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
